name: Mir Shah
title: Senior Software Engineer | Full Stack, Distributed Systems & AI-Enabled Delivery
summary: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years of experience delivering scalable distributed systems, cloud-native SaaS platforms, and AI-enabled solutions across fintech, logistics, consulting, and enterprise software domains. Hands-on expertise in React, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, AWS, Kubernetes, and Terraform, with applied experience integrating LLMs and RAG-based automation into engineering workflows and customer-facing products. Proven record of leading technical design, raising engineering standards through mentoring, and partnering with global product and business stakeholders to drive reliable, high-quality delivery at scale.

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer
responsibilities: Delivered 20+ concurrent client engagements across SaaS, logistics, AI, and enterprise software domains, owning architecture, technical strategy, stakeholder management, and end-to-end execution.

Designed cloud-native architectures on AWS and Kubernetes, defining deployment strategies, service boundaries, Terraform-managed infrastructure, and observability standards to support scalable production systems.
Built RAG-based and LLM-powered automation solutions that reduced manual document-processing effort by approximately 50%, demonstrating measurable AI impact on operational efficiency.

Embedded AI-assisted development practices — including AI-augmented code generation, testing, and architectural exploration — into delivery workflows to improve engineering velocity across client engagements.
Established engineering standards, reusable frameworks, and CI/CD pipeline conventions that improved onboarding efficiency, deployment frequency, and delivery consistency across distributed teams.
Partnered with founders, product leaders, and executive stakeholders to define product roadmaps, long-term platform direction, and technical strategy aligned to business and compliance requirements.

experience.title: Senior Full Stack Consultant
responsibilities: Led development of enterprise SaaS applications supporting operational workflows, customer-facing products, and business-critical processes across a fast-growing AI-assisted product environment.

Designed and implemented LangChain-powered semantic search capabilities integrated into the SaaS platform, reducing information retrieval time by approximately 60% and improving customer-facing data processing efficiency.
Defined microservice boundaries, API contracts, and RESTful and GraphQL service interfaces for distributed systems supporting high-volume transaction processing and partner integrations.
Modernized React and TypeScript frontend architecture, improving code maintainability, automated test coverage, and development velocity across cross-functional engineering teams.
Automated repetitive workflow processes and elevated engineering standards through structured code reviews, architecture discussions, and hands-on mentoring of junior and mid-level engineers.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Designed and implemented a modular JSON-schema-based integration platform enabling interoperability across diverse backend technologies and partner ecosystems within a cross-border logistics environment.

Built a configurable and scalable platform from the ground up, supporting multiple customer implementations and partner integrations across distributed engineering teams in Europe, Asia, and North America.
Led development of a micro design system using Next.js, React, Vue, and React Native, backed by cloud-native AWS services, to standardize UI delivery across logistics-facing customer products.

Implemented test-driven development practices, analytics monitoring, Docker containerization, and Kubernetes orchestration to improve system reliability, observability, and operational readiness for freight and shipment-tracking workflows.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science (BS) in Computer Science
